summary: Planned non-mutating PR inventory classification for 10 job candidates. No shared canonical was selected. Security-sensitive PRs were routed to central security handling; already closed PR #82032 was left closed; remaining open non-security PRs were kept as independent backlog items unless maintainer judgment is the explicit blocker.

actions.reason: Standalone useful PR with active review blockers; not a duplicate, low-signal close, or merge candidate in this plan job.
Standalone exec behavior PR with failing proof/checks; keep open as independent, not closable or mergeable in this job.
Standalone session-state PR with missing proof; no evidence supports duplicate, superseded, low-signal, merge, or close action.
Security-boundary-labeled broad PR is out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup and should be handled by central OpenClaw security review.
Public plugin transcript API touches a security-boundary-labeled surface and linked security-sensitive issue; route this exact PR only.
Already closed before this plan; no close action may be emitted.
This looks ready for maintainer decision, but merge is blocked in this job and maintainer judgment is explicitly required.
Tool profile and plugin trust boundary changes are marked security-sensitive; route this exact PR to central OpenClaw security handling.
Standalone useful PR with conflicts and missing proof; no allowed fix, merge, or low-signal close action applies.
Standalone relevant bug-fix PR with technical blockers; keep open as independent, not closable or mergeable in this plan.

needs_human: #81572 requires maintainer decision before any merge or finalization because the hydrated artifact shows sufficient proof, passing checks, and an approving review-style comment, while job frontmatter blocks merge and requires human for maintainer_signal.
